title: Salt Squad(Cobblemon Pack)
description:
Just a small pack for me and my friends. 

Though the main attraction here is Cobblemon + CM adons, other mods like the RPG Series, Farmer's Delight Refabricated, and Terralith are present, too. Lastly are some QoL/performance/decorative/dependency mods.
body:
Just a small pack for me and my friends. 

Though the main attraction here is Cobblemon + some CM adons, other mods like the RPG Series, Farmer's Delight Refabricated, and Terralith are present, too, to add some variety to the typical gameplay loop. Lastly are some QoL/performance/decorative mods, as well as their respective dependencies.
